content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:6 SecureField) but review credentials are placeholders (demo_user.txt: "test", demo_password.txt: "changeme") and notes.txt is just "TBD".
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.1 when reviewers cannot sign in to reach core functionality, and placeholder credentials plus "TBD" notes may trigger a metadata rejection or review delay. Provide a working demo account with real credentials and notes explaining how to reach the app's main features behind the login before submission.
